text: "I wanted to let you know that the customer service representative I spoke to yesterday (John) was very polite, but he wasn't able to answer my questions about the new software update features. It would be helpful if your team was trained better on the new release notes before they go live."
Who am I? What am I? This is a philosophical paradox of immense proportions. Nothing makes sense here.
